---
name: Question
about: Ask a question about the project
title: '[QUESTION] '
labels: question
assignees: ''
---

## Question

Please ask your question here. Be as specific as possible.

## Context

Please provide any relevant context that might help us answer your question:

- What are you trying to achieve?
- What have you already tried?
- What documentation have you consulted?

## Environment (if relevant)

Please complete the following information if it's relevant to your question:
- OS: [e.g., Windows 10, macOS 11.0, Ubuntu 20.04]
- Browser [e.g., Chrome 95, Safari 15] (if applicable)
- Java Version [e.g., Java 11] (if applicable)
- Python Version [e.g., Python 3.9] (if applicable)
- Project Version/Commit: [e.g., commit hash or release version]

## Additional Information

Any additional information that might be helpful in answering your question.
